title: BEM-783 queue shell
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='
'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:59 (UTC+3)'
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
runner_text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
proc.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_results
now="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
count=0
for f in governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json; do
  [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  count=$((count+1))
  base="$(basename "$f" .json)"
  out="governance/workflow_dispatch_results/${base}.status.json"
  workflow="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get("workflow") or d.get("workflow_id") or d.get("file") or "")' "$f")"
  ref="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get("ref") or "main")' "$f")"
  if [ -z "$workflow" ]; then
    printf '{"status":"missing_workflow","queue_file":"%s","time":"%s"}
' "$f" "$now" > "$out"
    continue
  fi
  if [ -z "${GH_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
    printf '{"status":"token_missing","queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}
' "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"
    continue
  fi
  if gh workflow run "$workflow" --ref "$ref"; then
    printf '{"status":"dispatch_attempted","exit_code":0,"queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}
' "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"
  else
    code=$?
    printf '{"status":"dispatch_failed","exit_code":%s,"queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}
' "$code" "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"
  fi
done
echo "processed_queue_items=$count"
''')
commit=Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')
commit.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
git add -A governance/workflow_dispatch_results || true
git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No dispatch result changes" || git commit -m "BEM-783 workflow dispatch queue results"
git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
git push || true
''')
insert='''
      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: bash scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh
      - name: Commit workflow dispatch queue results
        if: always()
        run: bash scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh
'''
changed=False
if runner.exists() and 'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh' not in runner_text:
    marker='      - name: Complete job'
    if marker in runner_text:
        runner_text=runner_text.replace(marker,insert+marker,1)
    else:
        runner_text=runner_text+insert
    runner.write_text(runner_text)
    changed=True
checks=[
 {'name':'processor_shell_exists','pass':proc.exists(),'evidence':str(proc)},
 {'name':'commit_shell_exists','pass':commit.exists(),'evidence':str(commit)},
 {'name':'runner_has_processor_step','pass':'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh' in (runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''),'evidence':str(runner)},
 {'name':'runner_has_no_inline_queue_python','pass':'python3 - <<' not in (runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''),'evidence':str(runner)}]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='codex_runner_shell_queue_processor_installed' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'SHELL_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_INSTALL_FAILED','failed':failed}
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem783_next_tick_shell_queue_processor.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-783 Next | Tick shell queue processor'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Next: run fresh Codex tick to process queue and inspect workflow_dispatch_results.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-783 SHELL QUEUE PROCESSOR'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: fresh Codex tick then verify dispatch results and Claude runtime.'+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'patch_codex_runner_queue_processor_shell.v1','bem':'BEM-783','status':status,'runner_changed':changed,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem783_patch_codex_runner_queue_processor_shell.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem783_patch_codex_runner_queue_processor_shell.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-783 | Patch Codex Runner Queue Processor Shell | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Runner changed: '+str(changed)+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem783_patch_codex_runner_queue_processor_shell','status':status,'runner_changed':changed,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem783_patch_codex_runner_queue_processor_shell.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-783 '+status+' runner_changed='+str(changed)+'
')
changed_files.extend([str(proc),str(commit),str(runner),str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Patched codex-runner with shell workflow dispatch queue processor and explicit result commit step')
"""
No issue comments.
